source_route_reset.route_reset_main_conclusion: Stop the per-component raster-target mainline and move to geometry-primary component-set design.

main_conclusion: 25.19 converts the stopped raster-target mainline into a geometry-primary component-set future-work package. Component identity is predicted as geometry slots first; masks and depth maps are derived artifacts for evaluation, weak diagnostics, and later forward consistency.

geometry_primary_component_set_schema.K_meaning: K=3 is the maximum number of component slots in the surface multi-pit component set; it is not a Piao kernel count.
geometry_primary_component_set_schema.two_component_slot_policy: Two-component samples use two active slots and one non-existing slot. The inactive slot has existence target 0 and is excluded from component geometry losses except for the empty-slot existence term.

slot_fields.name: existence_prob
slot_fields.target_policy: 1 for real component slots, 0 for padded empty slots

slot_fields.name: center_x_m
slot_fields.role: component center x coordinate in meters
slot_fields.target_policy: derived from raw component geometry labels; masked when slot is non-existing

slot_fields.name: center_y_m
slot_fields.role: component center y coordinate in meters
slot_fields.target_policy: derived from raw component geometry labels; masked when slot is non-existing

slot_fields.name: rotation_angle
slot_fields.target_policy: periodic angular target; near-circular or weak-rotation components may use uncertainty-aware scoring

slot_fields.name: shape_family
slot_fields.target_policy: component-level family label when available; otherwise recorded as missing rather than guessed

slot_fields.name: compact_shape_parameters
slot_fields.target_policy: derived only from explicit raw labels or deterministic geometry metadata; missing fields are recorded, not inferred

label_derivation_sources: component-level raw masks/depths as diagnostic cross-checks
COMSOL top-up labels as future explicit source data
geometry_primary_component_set_schema.missing_label_policy: If a required geometry field is absent, record the missing field in the derivation audit and block that sample or field from supervised geometry loss; do not synthesize labels from latest/newest artifacts.

geometry_derived_targets_and_evaluator.per_component_raster_supervision_boundar: Per-component raster mask/depth are no longer the main supervision target.
geometry_derived_targets_and_evaluator.union_evaluator_use: Derived union mask/depth are the primary geometric quality check for whether predicted slots reconstruct the observed surface footprint and depth field.

matching_cost.empty_slot_policy: Empty slots are matched through explicit non-existence targets and are not penalized as missed real components.
matching_cost.rotation_uncertainty_policy: Near-circular or weak-rotation components may down-weight rotation error or use confidence-aware angular scoring to avoid false failures when orientation is not identifiable.

first_gate_25_20.scope: Only separated and close two-component samples are eligible.
first_gate_25_20.purpose: Verify whether the most observable and topologically simplest component geometry can be learned before expanding to hard topology.
pass_conditions: component geometry metrics clearly beat degenerate predictors
derived union mask/depth are geometrically reasonable
fail_conditions: separated and close two-component cases still cannot be separated
empty slot false positives are frequent
derived union mask/depth are clearly inconsistent with raw union targets

forward_consistency_entry.training_loop_boundary: COMSOL is not placed inside the training loop.
forward_consistency_entry.planned_path: geometry slots -> derived profile/mask/depth -> lightweight forward surrogate or feature-space residual -> Bx/By/Bz residual
forward_consistency_entry.loss_role: Only after evaluator/referee value is demonstrated should forward consistency be considered as a training loss.
forward_consistency_entry.relationship_to_surface_forward_refineme: The existing surface forward-refinement companion is RBC-representable and does not replace 20.85. Multi-pit needs a geometry-primary forward-consistency companion after the slot route is validated; it also does not replace 20.85.

completion_conditions: multi-pit dataset and failure evidence are complete

route_decision: A. enter 25.20 separated/close two-component geometry-primary training gate only if continuing beyond current completion package; no baseline transition
